MonsterTruckFerrari_03Colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$0
}%11111111_01100000_01100000_10000000,{   'index=$1
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$2
}%11111111_10100000_10100000_10100100,{   'index=$3
}%11111111_01000000_01000000_01000000,{   'index=$4
}%11111111_11111111_11111011_11110000     'index=$5
     'Total number of colors = $6 = 6 (decimal)

}%11111111_01000000_00100000_00000000,{   'index=$1

}%11111111_01000000_01000000_01000000,{   'index=$8
}%11111111_11100000_11000000_00000000,{   'index=$9
}%11111111_11111111_11111011_11110000     'index=$a
     'Total number of colors = $b = 11 (decimal)

MonsterTruckFerrari_32Colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=$0
}%11111111_00000000_00010101_00111111,{   'index=$1
}%11111111_00000001_00011011_01001000,{   'index=$2
}%11111111_00000010_00100011_01010101,{   'index=$3
}%11111111_00000100_00101100_01100111,{   'index=$4
}%11111111_00011010_00111111_01111010,{   'index=$5
}%11111111_11111101_11111101_11111101,{   'index=$6
}%11111111_10100010_10101000_10111111,{   'index=$7
}%11111111_00000000_00001110_00110111     'index=$8
     'Total number of colors = $9 = 9 (decimal)
